calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randi Teichman for Pamela Raley (Petitioner/Executor).

Ms. Teichman addressed statutory fees stating that unfortunately they were very sloppy with keeping time records, that she was not anticipating having to provide time records, that there was mostly cash, that they dealt with a boat lease and that they dealt with property tax issues. Ms. Teichman also stated that the additional compensation is for income tax services, that they always did the Decedent's income taxes, that if they sent it out the estate would have to pay more, that the Attorney does not supervise the tax accountants at her firm and that there were no lawyers and no paralegals. In addition, Ms. Teichman stated that the Accountant charges $265.00 an hour, that it was for three tax returns, that the Decedent had foreign accounts, that it was fairly complicated and that she estimates on average accountants would charge $600.00 or $700.00 if sent out. The Petition to Approve Final Report, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-07-2019 Continued To Jan-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Continued To Sep-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randi Teichman for Pamela Raley (Personal Representative).

Ms. Teichman stated that petition is drafted with the exception of the Personal Representative not having provided her costs, that both of them are going to be on vacation, and requested a month to get the Personal Representative's signature and to get the petition filed. Status on close of estate is continued to September 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order
